
---

## Install (Apple Silicon)

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iliutaadrian/mox/main/install.sh | bash
```

Or download `mox-darwin-arm64` below, `chmod +x`, and move it onto your `PATH`.

> Intel Macs: no prebuilt binary yet — [run from source](https://github.com/iliutaadrian/mox#run-from-source-dev).
